tiktok.caption: Every time you say 'I deserve this,' your brain just switched off its spending filter. It has a name — and a $4,800/year price tag.

youtube_short.title: The 'I Deserve This' Trap Costs You $4,800/Year
title_alternatives: Why 'Treat Yourself' Is Stealing Your Retirement
Moral Licensing: The $576K Habit Nobody Talks About
youtube_short.description: Every time you finish a workout, stick to your diet, or hit a work deadline — your brain hands itself a permission slip to splurge. Scientists call it moral licensing, and it costs the average American $4,800 every single year. Invested over 30 years? That's $576,000. The fix is simple: wait 24 hours before any reward purchase. It kills 67% of these impulse buys instantly. Follow for more money psychology they never taught you in school. #moneytips #personalfinance #moneypsychology #financialfreedom

hook_line: You earned this... or did your brain lie to you?
